capture_method: Claude Code's native memory is the CLAUDE.md hierarchy (project, user, enterprise). Read at session start, injected as system-prompt text — not as MCP tools.
notes: Like metalmind-loopback, this is a zero-tool baseline. The cost is the text content of CLAUDE.md files themselves, not standing tool schemas. Useful as a floor for the comparison — confirms 'CLAUDE.md-as-instructions' is a legitimate design pattern, not a metalmind hack.
